zh.Trotton, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可特洛頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Camoys於大約1320年出生在英國素可特洛頓時，他的父親Ralph de Camoys38歲，母親Elizabeth le Despenser22歲。他於1351年之前與Elizabeth le Latimer結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1363年在英國素可享年44歲。

zh-hans.Trotton, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可特洛頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Camoys于大约1320年出生在英国素可特洛頓时，他的父亲Ralph de Camoys38岁，母亲Elizabeth le Despenser22岁。他于1351年之前与Elizabeth le Latimer结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1363年在英国素可享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Camoys was born about 1320, in Trotton, Sussex, England, his father, Ralph de Camoys, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth le Despenser, was 22. He married Elizabeth le Latimer before 1351. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1363, in Sussex, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Camoys est né environ 1320, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Camoys, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth le Despenser, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth le Latimer avant 1351. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1363, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Camoys um 1320 in Trotton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Camoys 38 und seine Mutter Elizabeth le Despenser 22. Er hat vor 1351 Elizabeth le Latimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1363 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Camoys è nato il circa 1320 nel Trotton, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Camoys, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth le Despenser, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth le Latimer prima del 1351. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1363, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Trotton, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックストロットオン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Camoysが約1320年にイギリススセックストロットオンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Camoysは38歳，母Elizabeth le Despenserは22歳であった。1351年以前にElizabeth le Latimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1363年にイギリススセックスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Camoys(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 수세스 트로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Camoys(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth le Despenser(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1351년 이전 Elizabeth le Latimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1363년 영국 수세스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Trotton, Sussex, England: Trotton, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Camoys nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Camoys, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth le Despenser, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth le Latimer antes 1351. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1363, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Camoys родился около 1320 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Camoys было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth le Despenser, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth le Latimer перед 1351 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1363 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Camoys nació aproximadamente 1320, en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Camoys, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth le Despenser, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth le Latimer antes de 1351. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1363, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
